decisions.decision: FVT-04f test uses INVALID_SLUG (uppercase+underscore) instead of ..%2Fetc%2Fpasswd
decisions.rationale: Starlette decodes %2F to / before routing — %2F-encoded traversal slug returns 404 (route non-match), not 400. Guard is equally exercised by any slug with chars outside [a-z0-9-].

decisions.decision: Tests must run via 'uv run python3 -m pytest' not 'python3 -m pytest'
decisions.rationale: rapidfuzz and other module deps are in the uv venv, not system Python.

decisions.decision: Worktree merge skips ROADMAP.md bash cp backup/restore
decisions.rationale: PreToolUse hook blocks bash cp that overwrites ROADMAP.md. Executors don't modify it, so no restore needed. Use Edit/Write tools if ROADMAP.md needs updating after merge.
